title: Narrow prompt templates for lightweight operators to reduce role drift and redundant wording
summary: github-operator / doc-editor / ops-automator / dss-manager の prompt を短い role-specific template に寄せ、board-level の再掲や横断判断を出しすぎないようにする。
observations: agent-staffing-and-prompt-tuning-board-20260326-0630.md で、github-operator と doc-editor は役割を狭く保つほど強いと整理されている。
agent-lesson-capture-20260326-0615.md では、github-operator は repo hygiene 専任、doc-editor は runbook / checklist 圧縮専任と明示されている。
agent-performance-optimization-review-20260326-0715.md でも、ライト役は mini + low 思考でほぼ適正で、重複を減らすには scope と wording を細くする方が効くとされている。
board-premeeting-brief-latest.md では、同じ論点の再掲が強く、出力は短く再利用しやすい形が望ましい。
proposed_changes: github-operator / doc-editor / ops-automator / dss-manager の prompt 先頭に、1 行の remit と anti-scope を追加する。
各 role の出力を、'結論 / 理由 / 次アクション' を基本にして 5 行以内へ圧縮する。
board-level の背景説明や繰り返しの前置きを削り、差分・判断・次工程だけを返すよう wording を揃える。
doc-editor は runbook / checklist 圧縮、github-operator は repo hygiene、ops-automator は read-only 監視、dss-manager は E2E/receipt に固定する。
変更対象は prompts / docs / runbook wording に限定し、auth / trust boundary / routing root は触らない。
evidence: role drift is repeatedly called out for lightweight operators
doc-editor and github-operator are better when kept narrow
light roles are already in the right model/thinking band; wording is the remaining lever
redundant board-level preambles are still visible in submissions
expected_benefit: reduces redundant wording and role drift
makes outputs easier to review and reuse
keeps lightweight operators in their narrow lanes
next_step: Run verification before moving to VERIFIED.

review.reason: Board 2026-03-27 synthesis selected this as an approve candidate. Low-risk docs/prompts/runbook wording only: the change narrows lightweight operator prompt templates, keeps scope on remit/anti-scope and wording compression, and does not touch auth / trust boundary / routing root / protected paths. Specifics: proposal_id=proposal-20260327-narrow-role-prompt-templates; summary='Narrow prompt templates for lightweight operators to reduce role drift and redundant wording'; proposed_changes focus on 1-line remit+anti-scope, <=5-line outputs, and fixed role scopes; affected_paths are docs/runbooks only under projects/openclaw-core/docs plus two cron reports; reason is reversible and board-approved as low-risk, so approve with assisted apply.
